name: list_signature_requests
description: List all signature requests associated with your HelloSign account. Results are paginated and returned in reverse chronological order (newest first). Each entry includes the request title, completion status, signer details, and timestamps. Use the page parameter to paginate through results (20 per page by default). Optionally filter by account_id to see requests from a specific team member.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, starting at 1. Default: 1.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default: 20. Maximum: 100.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Filter by the account ID of a specific team member. Only applicable for team accounts.
